pi_items.source: task.json metadata (line 18), docker-compose.yml PUBLIC_URL (line 25), docker-compose.yml port mapping (line 7), setup_task.sh (line 84)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a test meeting room named 'TeamStandup' in Jitsi Meet running locally on http://localhost:8080. Jitsi Meet is deployed via Docker using stable-9753 images and is accessible at the specified localhost URL with port 8080. The room name and URL are test/synthetic data used for UI testing purposes.
